language.heading: Language
language.description: App interface language. Save with the button below — applies to this account on all devices.
language.label: Language

welcome.title: Set up your restaurant
welcome.description: Name, address, hours, and color — a few steps and you’re ready. You can refine everything later.

identity.title: What’s your restaurant called?
identity.description: This name appears in the app, on the menu, and on your public profile.

location.title: Where can people find you?
location.description: Address and country drive timezone, maps, and public details. You can fill gaps later.

hours.title: When are you open?
hours.description: Pick your usual hours — exceptions and kitchen times can be set later in settings.

look.title: Your color
look.description: The accent tints buttons, highlights, and branding across the app.
look.previewHint: This is how your workspace will feel.

errors.hoursRequired: Please select at least one open day.
errors.membershipFailed: Could not link you to the restaurant.
errors.activeFailed: Could not set the active restaurant.

reservation.successHint: Please note your reservation number and PIN for later changes.
reservation.changeRequestHint: The restaurant will review your request and get back to you if needed.
reservation.errorContactRequired: Please enter a phone number or email.
reservation.errorNotifyChannel: Please enable email or WhatsApp notifications.
reservation.errorOutsideHours: This time is outside opening hours.
reservation.errorLeadTime: This time is before the restaurant’s minimum lead time.
reservation.errorNotEditable: This reservation can no longer be changed.
reservation.errorNotFound: Restaurant not found or not published.
reservation.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
reservation.hintParty: Please enter the party size (at least 1).
reservation.hintContact: Enter a phone number or email.
reservation.hintNotifyChannel: Enable at least email or WhatsApp notifications.

scope.title: 1. Scope
scope.p1: These terms govern online table reservations at {name} (“Restaurant”) via the embedded reservation form. By submitting a reservation, you agree to these terms.
scope.p2: The contracting party is the restaurant as the provider of the hospitality service; technical provision of the form may be handled by a processor.

contract.title: 2. Reservation and contract formation
contract.p1: Your request is an offer to conclude a hospitality contract (table reservation) for the stated details. The contract is formed when the restaurant confirms the reservation (e.g. by email, WhatsApp, or phone) or records it as confirmed in its system.
contract.p2: Until confirmation, the restaurant may decline the reservation, especially if fully booked, for events, or if details are missing. Changes and cancellations are possible via the reservation number and PIN provided in the form, where the restaurant offers this.

guestDuties.title: 3. Guest obligations
guestDuties.p1: You provide accurate details (name, contact, party size, date/time) and arrive at the reserved time or cancel in good time.
guestDuties.p2: For repeated no-shows or serious breaches, the restaurant may refuse future reservations.

privacy.title: 4. Privacy (GDPR)
privacy.p1: The controller under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is {name} as the operator of the reservation. Contact details of the controller (address, email) are available from the restaurant on site or on its website.
privacy.p2: Legal bases for processing include in particular Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (contract or pre-contractual steps for the reservation), Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent, e.g. for email/WhatsApp notifications if you enable them), and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in proper guest management and communication).
privacy.p3: Processed data may include: first and last name, phone number, email address, party size, requested date/time, reservation number and PIN, technical metadata (e.g. submission time), and notification preferences.
privacy.p4: Purposes of processing: receiving and managing your reservation, assigning tables, contacting you with questions, sending status messages (receipt, confirmation, reminder, change, cancellation), meeting legal retention duties, and preventing abuse.
privacy.p5: Retention: reservation data are stored only as long as needed for handling, proof, and legal retention periods; then deleted or anonymized unless legal retention duties require otherwise.
privacy.p6: Recipients: data are processed within the reservation system; processors (hosting, email/WhatsApp delivery) may be used under Art. 28 GDPR contracts. Transfers to third countries occur only where Art. 44 et seq. GDPR requirements are met.
privacy.p7: Your rights: access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection (especially to processing based on legitimate interests), and withdrawal of consent for the future. You may lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (e.g. in Germany, the competent state authority).
privacy.p8: Where processing is based on consent, consent is voluntary; however, details required for the contract and acceptance of these terms are necessary for the reservation.

notifications.title: 5. Notifications
notifications.p1: If you enable email or WhatsApp notifications, you consent to receiving reservation-related messages via the chosen channel. You can select channels in the form; at least one channel must be active so you can be informed of status changes.
notifications.p2: You may withdraw consent at any time with effect for the future (e.g. by unsubscribing or contacting the restaurant).

cancellation.title: 6. Cancellation and no-show
cancellation.p1: Cancellations and changes follow the restaurant’s rules; use the functions in the form (reservation number and PIN) where offered.
cancellation.p2: For an unexcused absence (no-show), the restaurant may claim damages where not restricted by law.

liability.title: 7. Liability
liability.p1: The restaurant is fully liable for intent and gross negligence and for injury to life, body, or health. Otherwise, the restaurant is liable only for breach of essential contractual duties, limited to foreseeable, typical damage.
liability.p2: No liability is accepted for disruptions of the online form outside the restaurant’s control, to the extent permitted by law.

final.title: 8. Final provisions
final.p1: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods, unless mandatory consumer protection rules of your country of residence require otherwise.
final.p2: If any provision is invalid, the remaining terms remain effective.
final.p3: Version: May 2026. The restaurant may update these terms; the version available at the time of your reservation applies.
